<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
Note we aren't using Thermodynamics v1 in the manifests yet. I think CloudMicrophysics needs to be updated in ClimaAtmos for that? I'm not sure

title: up deps; allow Thermodynamics v1
